choices: Full implementations of partitioning algorithms on tiny instances
items.explain: Algorithm / toy-engine literacy on scoped graphs.

items.prompt: A good partition usually ignores balance as long as cutsize is zero.
items.explain: Balance keeps parts usable for floorplan and place; empty cuts with one empty part are useless.

choices: Browser intuition then implement metrics on tiny graphs
items.explain: Track B then Track A hardens the idea.
